---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Warp Protocol
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? How does it improve the
classification pipeline or developer experience?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred approach. Include API signatures, data flow, or architecture
diagrams if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why were they not chosen?

## Affected Packages

Which parts of the codebase would this feature touch?

- [ ] packages/scanner
- [ ] packages/classifier
- [ ] packages/verdict-engine
- [ ] packages/api
- [ ] packages/sdk
- [ ] programs/warp-attestation
- [ ] models/training
- [ ] models/inference
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Additional Context

Any references, research, or examples that support the feature request.
